do_not_share: Agent endpoints or raw Agent metadata
API keys, judge keys, or model secrets
browser, video, app, or personal private context

purpose: Machine-readable adoption recipes for Kimi, Codex, WorkBuddy, and private platform Agents.

acceptance_evidence: no Study Anything custody of real model keys
recipes.operator_goal: Prove the local-first platform Agent path before adding real model keys.
recipes.platform_agent_role: Keep the conversation surface, explain commands, and report only redacted evidence.
recipes.study_anything_role: Generate and verify the platform adoption pack, ecosystem submission, and adoption proof.
recipes.title: First Adoption

recipes.operator_goal: Summarize current project state from local metadata-only Cognitive Loop artifacts.
recipes.platform_agent_role: Run local commands, open local HTML if allowed, and summarize artifact paths, hashes, status, and next commands.
recipes.study_anything_role: Create snapshots, LoopRuns, event indexes, and static artifact indexes without embedding file contents.
recipes.title: Daily Project Review

recipes.operator_goal: Gate risky actions until the human explicitly approves or rejects the decision.
recipes.platform_agent_role: Request human approval, preserve the decision result, and never auto-apply repair actions.
recipes.study_anything_role: Record Human Mastery Gate status and produce manual-only doctor and repair-plan evidence.
recipes.title: Risk Decision

recipes.operator_goal: Turn repo, document, app, web, or video-slice context into learning, eval, and second-brain handoff evidence.
recipes.platform_agent_role: Collect external context and call Study Anything without handing it browser control or real model keys.
recipes.study_anything_role: Run source-bound learning, Agent audit/eval, Obsidian export, NotebookLM-style package, and second-brain handoff.
recipes.title: Learning Handoff
